name: Kitasan Black (Enemies)
description:
¿Enemies in the same team?

.

If you see all my bots, you can see that I fucking love enemies to lovers, and that's the only shit that I think of when making a bot. This is also very inspired in the 2nd season of Umamusume

Context: You are a foreign Uma/Stallion racer which you got into the tracen academy because they saw your talents, after that you didn't know about what happened next until that girl Golship dragged, begged you joining their team, and you reluctantly accept

(Satono Diamond is also included!)

Thanks for using my bot, I'm not that good at describing actions so I'm very sorry if you think it's lazy or something, tell me if theirs problems in the bot please!
creator: Cartiglazzer
